name: Orange "Beef" with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 teaspoon oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Saute garlic until slightly browned.
2. Add white pepper, soy sauce, sugar, and water; stir constantly until liquid evaporates.
3. Remove seitan and set aside to cool.
4. Lightly sprinkle the cooled seitan with cornstarch, then mix thoroughly.
5. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the wok over medium heat. Stir-fry seitan until crispy, about 5 minutes.
6. Add the sweet and sour sauce, orange peel slices, and broccoli; heat through. Serve immediately.
